meta.title: CMS Reference - Overview
meta.excerpt: Strapi CMS schema, content models, and API architecture

seo.metaDescription: Strapi CMS schema, content models, and API architecture

props.text: Comprehensive overview of the Strapi CMS backend architecture, content type definitions, API configuration, and integration patterns with the Next.js frontend.

props.body:
Articles - Technical articles and case studies
• Tutorials - Step-by-step learning content
• Case Studies - Real-world implementation examples
• Testimonials - Client feedback and success stories
• Form Submissions - Contact and inquiry forms
• Content Library - General purpose content storage

Site Settings - Global site configuration
• Homepage Hero - Landing page hero section
• Global Navigation - Sidebar and menu configuration
• Footer Content - Footer sections and links

Hero Section - Large hero banners with CTAs
• Call-to-Action Block - Prominent action blocks
• Feature Cards - Feature showcase grid
• Testimonial Block - Client testimonial cards
• FAQ Accordion - Frequently asked questions
• Code Block - Syntax-highlighted code snippets
• Quote Block - Styled quotations
• Image Gallery - Image grid and carousel
• Video Embed - YouTube and Vimeo embeds
• Text with Image - Content and image layouts
• Three Column Grid - Three item layouts
• Button Group - Multiple action buttons
• Breadcrumb Navigation - Navigation breadcrumbs
• Meta Tags - SEO metadata
• Social Links - Social media integration
• Author Info - Author bio and credits
• Related Items - Related content links
• Rich Text - Full rich text editing

TypeScript code generation from Strapi schemas
• Zod validation schemas for runtime safety
• Type guards for content type discrimination
• Polymorphic content support for dynamic zones
• Strict null checks enabled

REST API: Full CRUD operations
• GraphQL: Optimized query interface
• API Routes: Custom server actions
• Webhooks: Event-driven integration
• Rate Limiting: IP-based throttling
• CORS: Configured for frontend access
• Authentication: Token-based for admin APIs
